summary: load_bearing_content_audit corrected to honestly acknowledge the "zero falsifications" phrase loss and identify the rhetorical-purpose carriers in the new figures row. — Full detail and corrected proposal in EXP-261-overview-hero-rework-v2.json. Resolution path: decider applies EXP-261 patches → curmudgeon spot-check → on green, close ISS-1574 as fixed-by-EXP-261.
fix_summary: EXP-261 load_bearing_content_audit honestly acknowledges that the literal phrase "zero falsifications" is removed from the Overview tab (it appeared exactly once in generate-html.js, in the deleted sublabel). Audit explicitly identifies the rhetorical-purpose carriers in the new hero: (a) "Survive scrutiny: 0" figure provides the contradicting 0, (b) "Acknowledged + silent failures" figure provides the numerical refutation. accuracy-math-section is preserved untouched per out_of_scope; adding the phrase back would mildly violate that.
